description: Fragment of a business letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: probably no earlier than 13th century. Refers to "the agreement that was between me and you" and apparently rebuking the addressee for breaking it. Mentions the price of certain goods. Seems to be the same handwriting as T-S NS 141.44 + ENA 3636.5; T-S AS 165.99; and T-S AS 173.371
